name: AMERICAN BATTERY MATERIALS, INC.
business: American Battery Materials, Inc. is an exploration stage company focused on the extraction, refinement and distribution of lithium and magnesium from brine deposits using direct lithium extraction (DLE) technology. As of the filing date, it has no mineral reserves, has not commenced mining operations, and has generated no revenue.

tamClaims.claim: US lithium demand predicted to grow nearly 500% by 2030 to almost 412,000 tonnes of lithium carbonate equivalent.
tamClaims.sentence: In an article from April 4, 2024, titled US lithium demand predicted to grow nearly 500% by 2030 , Fastmarkets forecasts a significant growth in demand for lithium in the US of 487% to almost 412,000 tonnes of lithium carbonate equivalent by 2030.

tamClaims.claim: Global passenger EV sales projected to climb from 13.9 million in 2023 to over 30 million by 2027.
tamClaims.sentence: According to that report, global passenger EV sales are projected to climb from 13.9 million in 2023 to over 30 million by 2027, with the EV share of new vehicle sales reaching 33%, driven by declining battery costs down 90% over the past decade and innovative models from automakers.

tamClaims.claim: BESS installations surged at 150% CAGR since 2020, reaching 166 GWh in 2024, projected to grow to 2,100 GWh by 2035 at 20% CAGR.
tamClaims.sentence: BESS installations have surged at a 150% CAGR since 2020, reaching 166 GWh in 2024, and are projected to grow to 2,100 GWh by 2035 at a 20% CAGR.
Benchmark Minerals forecasts significant deficits within a decade, with lithium and nickel facing shortfalls of 572,000 tonnes and 839,000 tonnes by 2034 seven times larger than today s surpluses.

tamClaims.claim: Global primary magnesium production in 2023 was estimated at 940,000 metric tons, with China dominating at nearly 90%.
tamClaims.sentence: Global primary magnesium production in 2023 was estimated at 940,000 metric tons, with China dominating at nearly 90% of the supply.

tamClaims.claim: The worldwide lithium battery market is expected to grow by a factor of 5 to 10 in the next decade.
tamClaims.sentence: The NBLB Report summarizes the U.S. government s views on the need for lithium and the expected growth of the lithium battery market as follows: ... The worldwide lithium battery market is expected to grow by a factor of 5 to 10 in the next decade.
